Dual-strategy flexibility
One CAPEX
Dual-strategy model
Same total investment supports both a 12.13% hotel ROI and a fully passive 8.59% corporate rental yield. Investor selects strategy at acquisition.
Operational self-sufficiency
Automated laundry facility on the mezzanine level. Outsourcing costs minimised, OPEX kept lean from day one.
Secret Courtyard Garden
90 m² rooftop terrace configurable as a cocktail lounge or fixed commercial sub-lease at €1,200 / month. Zero inventory risk.
Rooftop · 90 m²

The Secret Courtyard

A 90 m² sheltered rooftop terrace with authentic views over Ioannina’s historic tiled-roof skyline. Configurable as a cocktail lounge or leased at €1,200 / month on a fixed commercial contract — with zero inventory risk.

Open terrace 90 m²
Premium units 2
Revenue model F&B + ADR premium

Investment strategy

01
Dual-strategy entry
Asset supports two fully modelled strategies: boutique hotel at 12.13% ROI or corporate long-term rental at 8.59% ROI. One acquisition, two exit-ready models.
€1,651,800 total investment · both models verified
02
Modernisation
Down-to-the-studs renovation. All new MEP systems — mechanical, electrical, plumbing — and premium interior finishes throughout every key.
Full MEP replacement · Premium specification
03
Professional management
Hotel operated via third-party hospitality manager; rental model managed through a single local agency. Both structures tested against Ioannina’s tech cluster and tourism demand.
Minimal overhead · Scalable operations
